raw_consumer_statement: Made a purchase on XX/XX/XXXX for {$1900.00}, the store representative forgot to apply the correct promotional rate. Called Citi Bank was advised to return to the store to redo the transaction. Bestbuy processed an incorrect refund to rectify this issue. Bestbuy refunded {$1500.00} on XX/XX/XXXX and recharged {$1700.00} at XXXX percent interest. I was under the impression the issue was resolved although the amounts didn't add up. I received a letter from CitiBank on XX/XX/XXXX stating they accidentally applied interest to my purchase and were rectifying the issue that I thought was resolved. They added a balance of {$1900.00} to my credit card account, with the correct XXXX percent rate. Additionally, they refunded me {$1700.00} to offset the charge that was made {$1700.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. The actual issue is I was charged {$1900.00} and only refunded {$1500.00} therefor I am owed {$480.00}. I have invested many hours, phone calls, cases and disputes to rectify this issue and I have gotten nowhere. Please help
